title: Rule
description: A Rule defines the conditions under which a Capability is valid — the business logic that must be satisfied before a Capability can proceed. Rules are checked after Policy and before execution.

capability.description: The Capability this rule applies to, expressed as Noun.Verb.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this rule enforces.

conditions.description: The conditions that must all be satisfied for the capability to proceed.
